creator: george@nycbug.org
text:
net/torsocks is still old version of 2.0.0.  Current version (as of 201505) is 2.1.0.  2.0.0 is not working.

Manually changing net/torsocks/Makefile "PORTVERSION= 2.1.0" and running "make makesum" and reinstalling works fine, even without other line changes in diff.
